execution_rules.smoke_check: git status --short --branch; bundled python -m compileall plugins.v2/downloadmanagerlocal; bundled python -m pytest --confcutdir=tests/static <expanded tests/static/test_downloadmanagerlocal_*.py files>

decision_log.reason: Project rules use long-lived per-plugin branches.
decision_log.rejected_alternatives: Create a new codex/* branch for the same plugin.

decision_log.decision: Create a standard-completion plan after the prior backend plan
decision_log.reason: The 2026-07-02 backend plan is complete but current audit still shows entrypoint and docstring standard gaps.
decision_log.rejected_alternatives: Declare completion from prior progress alone.

decision_log.decision: Keep UI source immutable and verify build/runtime assets
decision_log.reason: The user asked to complete plugin standards while preserving UI.
decision_log.rejected_alternatives: UI redesign or visible text/layout cleanup during backend standardization.

acceptance: Standard gaps are represented by tests or explicit progress evidence.
